notes: Mistral NDJSON v4: restored v1 array format [{}] + empty meta.values {}. Theory: superjson meta.values path mismatch caused deserialization failure in previous attempts. Empty meta.values avoids Date conversion issues. h2_mode=2 keep-alive. If this shows Error 6002 like #322, it confirms the array format is essential. If it shows the warning message, the meta.values was the blocker.
